summary: Kanban Planning Cantieri feature fully tested - all backend APIs (18/18 tests passed) and frontend UI working correctly. Board view returns 7 columns with correct labels and order. CRUD operations work. Status updates via PATCH work. Drag-and-drop moves cards between columns. Create modal has all required fields.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Dialog component missing aria-describedby attribute - minor accessibility issue that should be addressed but does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Playwright_Commessa during testing. One existing commessa com_9fcdb2901b9f (Cancello carraio Villa Rossi) remains in lavorazione status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban Planning feature complete. Tested: GET /api/commesse/board/view (7 columns), POST /api/commesse/ (create), PATCH /api/commesse/{id}/status (drag-drop), DELETE /api/commesse/{id}, GET /api/commesse/ (list). Frontend: Planning page at /planning with @hello-pangea/dnd drag-drop, create modal with client selector, all 7 column headers display correctly. Sidebar has 'Planning Cantieri' under Produzione group.

backend_api.board_view_7_columns: PASS - GET /api/commesse/board/view returns 7 columns in order
backend_api.board_column_labels: PASS - All labels match: Nuove Commesse, Approvvigionamento, In Lavorazione, Conto Lavoro, Pronto/Consegna, Montaggio/Posa, Completato
backend_api.create_commessa: PASS - POST /api/commesse/ creates with title, client_id, value, deadline, priority
backend_api.status_update_valid: PASS - PATCH /api/commesse/{id}/status updates and adds to status_history

frontend_ui.sidebar_link: PASS - 'Planning Cantieri' under Produzione group with data-testid='nav-planning'
frontend_ui.create_modal_fields: PASS - Title, Client, Value, Deadline, Priority, Description inputs present
frontend_ui.create_modal_save: PASS - data-testid='btn-save-commessa' creates and closes modal
frontend_ui.drag_and_drop: PASS - Dragging card between columns updates status in backend
